description_long: This object is a large, military-style firearm with a matte black and camouflage finish, featuring a prominent box magazine and a visible belt of ammunition. The weapon has a long barrel with a bipod attached near the muzzle, suggesting it is designed for stability during sustained fire. The stock is solid and angular, providing a sturdy shoulder rest, while the grip is ergonomic and positioned just behind the trigger. The receiver area is robust, with visible mechanical details and a top-mounted cover. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer or composite elements in the stock and grip. The object is detailed with realistic surface textures and functional components, including a trigger guard, magazine, and bipod.
description: A large, military-style shotgun with a camouflage finish, box magazine, visible ammo belt, bipod, and solid stock. Features detailed mechanical parts and a robust, realistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, bipod legs, and the slim profile of the stock and receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long barrel, bipod, box magazine, and camouflage-patterned stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the top of the receiver, with the grip and magazine partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the ammo belt, box magazine, and detailed bipod attachment.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long with attached bipod and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
